tasks.title: Implement trampoline interpreter with explicit call stack
tasks.notes: Architecture. Very high impact, high effort. Replaces recursive AST walker; required to run whole test262 suites.
tasks.exit_criteria: No conformance regression; relevant runtime invariants are covered by unit tests.

tasks.title: Make control flow and this explicit
tasks.notes: `break`/`continue` are propagated via a thread-local flag (`CONTROL_FLOW`), and native `this` is stashed in a thread-local (`CURRENT_THIS`). This breaks composability and conflicts with the HIR design.
tasks.exit_criteria: No conformance regression; relevant runtime invariants are covered by unit tests.

tasks.title: Remove redundant Context::globals HashMap
tasks.notes: `Context` maintains both `self.globals` and `self.env`, inserting globals into both maps. This duplicates storage and adds extra clones.
tasks.exit_criteria: No conformance regression; relevant runtime invariants are covered by unit tests.

tasks.title: Fix thread-safety bug in depth tracking
tasks.notes: The depth tracking in `crates/quench-runtime/src/interpreter/depth.rs` used a global `static CURRENT_DEPTH: AtomicUsize` that was shared across all test threads. When tests ran in parallel, they would interfere with each other's depth counters, causing flaky test failures.
tasks.exit_criteria: No conformance regression; relevant runtime invariants are covered by unit tests.

tasks.title: Fix Stack Overflow in Examples
tasks.notes: The stack overflow occurs because the JavaScript interpreter is recursive:
tasks.exit_criteria: No conformance regression; relevant runtime invariants are covered by unit tests.

tasks.title: Collapse value model into Value::Object with [[Call]] / [[Construct]] slots
tasks.notes: > **Minimum custom code.** Use the standard ECMAScript object model instead of custom variants.
tasks.exit_criteria: No conformance regression; relevant runtime invariants are covered by unit tests.

tasks.title: Make recursion depth counter thread-local
tasks.notes: > **Immediate fix for false stack-overflow errors in parallel tests.**
tasks.exit_criteria: No conformance regression; relevant runtime invariants are covered by unit tests.

tasks.title: Fix Stack Overflow in Examples
tasks.notes: > The canonical fix for recursive-interpreter stack overflow is Task 85 (trampoline interpreter). This task is closed in favor of that approach.
